# EasyFit

> EasyFit publishes Interval Timer Tabata and HIIT, an iPhone and Apple Watch app for timed Tabata, HIIT, circuit, EMOM, AMRAP, boxing, mobility, and home workout sessions.

## Primary Pages

- [Interval Timer Tabata and HIIT](https://easyfit.support/): Main product page for the EasyFit interval timer app.
- [Tabata Timer App for 20/10 and Custom Intervals](https://easyfit.support/tabata-timer/): Use EasyFit as a Tabata timer for classic 20/10 rounds, custom work and rest periods, exercise lists, Apple Watch heart rate, haptics, and music cues.
- [HIIT Interval Timer App for iPhone and Apple Watch](https://easyfit.support/hiit-interval-timer/): Build HIIT interval workouts with custom work, rest, rounds, voice cues, haptics, Apple Watch heart rate, Apple Health, widgets, and progress tracking.
- [Apple Watch HIIT Timer with Heart Rate and Haptics](https://easyfit.support/apple-watch-hiit-timer/): EasyFit is an Apple Watch HIIT timer for interval workouts with heart-rate workflows, haptic cues, Apple Health, voice prompts, and iPhone controls.
- [Interval Timer App for Workouts, Circuits, EMOM and AMRAP](https://easyfit.support/interval-timer/): EasyFit is a flexible interval timer app for Tabata, HIIT, circuit training, EMOM, AMRAP, boxing, mobility, and home workouts.
- [EMOM Timer App for Every Minute on the Minute Workouts](https://easyfit.support/emom-timer/): Run Every Minute on the Minute workouts with fixed minutes, exercise changes, rounds, haptic cues, voice prompts, Apple Watch, and Apple Health support.
- [AMRAP Timer App for As Many Rounds As Possible](https://easyfit.support/amrap-timer/): Set a time cap, complete as many rounds as possible, and keep pace with clear interval cues, haptics, progress tracking, Apple Watch, and Apple Health workflows.
- [Circuit Training Timer App for Stations and Rounds](https://easyfit.support/circuit-training-timer/): Build circuit workouts with stations, rest periods, rounds, exercise lists, voice prompts, haptic cues, Apple Watch context, and progress tracking.
- [Boxing Round Timer App for Rounds and Rest](https://easyfit.support/boxing-round-timer/): Time boxing, martial arts, and round-based conditioning with work intervals, rest periods, cues, haptics, music controls, and Apple Watch support.
- [Workout Interval Timer for Training Sessions](https://easyfit.support/workout-interval-timer/): Create repeatable workout timers for strength circuits, cardio intervals, mobility blocks, home workouts, and gym sessions with clear cues and progress.
- [Custom Interval Timer App for Work and Rest Periods](https://easyfit.support/custom-interval-timer/): Customize work, rest, rounds, preparation, cooldown, exercise lists, signals, haptics, music controls, widgets, and Apple Watch workflows.
- [Apple Health Workout Timer for Interval Training](https://easyfit.support/apple-health-workout-timer/): Use interval training workflows that can connect with Apple Health and Apple Watch when permissions are enabled, while keeping workouts structured and easy to follow.
- [iPhone Interval Timer App for HIIT, Tabata and Circuits](https://easyfit.support/iphone-interval-timer/): Run HIIT, Tabata, circuits, boxing rounds, mobility sessions, and home workouts from iPhone with voice cues, haptics, widgets, and music controls.
- [Home Workout Timer App for HIIT, Tabata and Circuits](https://easyfit.support/home-workout-timer/): Create timed home workouts with bodyweight circuits, Tabata rounds, HIIT blocks, mobility, stretching, warm-up, cooldown, and exercise lists.
- [Gym Timer App for Strength, Circuits and Conditioning](https://easyfit.support/gym-timer/): Use EasyFit in the gym for strength supersets, conditioning circuits, rest periods, timed rounds, Apple Watch context, and progress tracking.
- [Round Timer App for Training Rounds and Rest](https://easyfit.support/round-timer/): Time repeated rounds for boxing, circuits, HIIT, conditioning, mobility, and skill work with clear work/rest cues and adjustable rounds.
- [Mobility Timer App for Stretching and Recovery](https://easyfit.support/mobility-timer/): Create timed mobility flows, stretching blocks, recovery sessions, warm-ups, cooldowns, and exercise lists with gentle cues and progress tracking.
- [Strength Training Timer for Sets, Rest and Circuits](https://easyfit.support/strength-training-timer/): Manage timed strength sessions with rest periods, supersets, circuits, EMOM blocks, cues, Apple Watch context, and workout history.
- [Fitness Timer App for HIIT, Tabata, EMOM and AMRAP](https://easyfit.support/fitness-timer/): Use one fitness timer for HIIT, Tabata, EMOM, AMRAP, circuits, boxing, mobility, home workouts, Apple Watch, and Apple Health workflows.
- [Support](https://easyfit.support/support.html): Contact page for app support.
- [Privacy Notice](https://easyfit.support/privacy.html): Privacy information for the iOS app and website.
- [Terms of Use](https://easyfit.support/terms.html): Terms for the iOS app.

## App Summary

Interval Timer Tabata and HIIT helps users create timed workout sessions with custom work periods, rest periods, rounds, preparation, cooldown, and exercise lists. It supports Apple Watch heart-rate workflows, Apple Health integration, haptic cues, voice prompts, music controls, widgets, progress tracking, and personal fitness routines.

## Keywords and Topics

- Tabata timer
- HIIT interval timer
- EMOM timer
- AMRAP timer
- circuit training timer
- boxing round timer
- custom interval timer
- Apple Watch workout timer
- Apple Health fitness app
- home workout timer
- strength training timer
- mobility timer
- round timer app
- iPhone interval timer

## Training Guides

- [Tabata vs HIIT: How to Set the Right Interval Timer](https://easyfit.support/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Compare Tabata and HIIT timing, work periods, rest periods, rounds, cues, and Apple Watch workflows so your interval timer matches the workout.
- [EMOM vs AMRAP: Timer Settings for Each Workout Style](https://easyfit.support/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): Learn how EMOM and AMRAP workouts use different timer setups, cues, rounds, and progress tracking for interval training.
- [How to Set Up a Circuit Training Timer](https://easyfit.support/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): Build a circuit training timer with stations, rounds, rest periods, warm-up, cooldown, exercise lists, haptics, and Apple Watch support.
- [Boxing Round Timer Settings for Training Sessions](https://easyfit.support/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): Set up boxing rounds, rest periods, alerts, warm-up, cooldown, and haptic cues for boxing, martial arts, and conditioning workouts.
- [Workout Interval Timer Settings: Work, Rest, Rounds and Cues](https://easyfit.support/guides/workout-interval-timer-settings/): A practical guide to choosing work periods, rest periods, rounds, preparation, cooldown, and cues for interval workouts.
- [Warm-Up and Cooldown Timer Ideas for Interval Workouts](https://easyfit.support/guides/warm-up-and-cooldown-timer/): Use preparation, warm-up, cooldown, and transition timers to make HIIT, Tabata, circuit, and mobility sessions easier to follow.
- [Home Workout Interval Ideas with a Timer](https://easyfit.support/guides/home-workout-intervals/): Use an interval timer for home workouts, bodyweight circuits, Tabata rounds, mobility sessions, and repeatable training blocks.
- [Apple Watch Interval Training with Timers and Haptics](https://easyfit.support/guides/apple-watch-interval-training/): Use Apple Watch, haptics, heart-rate context, and iPhone controls to make interval training easier to follow.
- [Beginner Fitness Routine: How to Start with Timed Workouts](https://easyfit.support/guides/beginner-fitness-routine/): Build a simple beginner fitness routine with short timed sessions, repeatable workout blocks, rest days, mobility, and progress tracking.
- [Weekly Workout Plan: Balance HIIT, Strength, Mobility and Rest](https://easyfit.support/guides/weekly-workout-plan/): Plan a balanced training week with interval workouts, strength circuits, mobility sessions, active recovery, and rest days.
- [Active Recovery Days: Timed Mobility, Stretching and Easy Movement](https://easyfit.support/guides/active-recovery-days/): Use active recovery days for lighter timed movement, mobility, stretching, cooldowns, and habit-building between harder workouts.
- [Mobility Routine Timer: Structure Stretching and Movement Breaks](https://easyfit.support/guides/mobility-routine-timer/): Create a mobility routine timer for stretching, movement breaks, warm-ups, cooldowns, recovery sessions, and home workouts.
- [Tabata vs HIIT: den richtigen Intervalltimer einstellen](https://easyfit.support/de/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Vergleiche Tabata und HIIT, damit Arbeit, Pause, Runden und Signale zum Training passen.
- [Tabata vs HIIT: cómo configurar el temporizador correcto](https://easyfit.support/es/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Compara Tabata y HIIT para ajustar trabajo, descanso, rondas y señales al entrenamiento.
- [Tabata vs HIIT : choisir le bon minuteur d’intervalles](https://easyfit.support/fr/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Comparez Tabata et HIIT pour adapter travail, repos, tours et signaux à la séance.
- [Tabata vs HIIT: come impostare il timer giusto](https://easyfit.support/it/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Confronta Tabata e HIIT per adattare lavoro, recupero, round e segnali all’allenamento.
- [Tabata vs HIIT: como configurar o timer certo](https://easyfit.support/pt-br/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Compare Tabata e HIIT para ajustar trabalho, descanso, rounds e sinais ao treino.
- [TabataとHIITの違い：タイマー設定の選び方](https://easyfit.support/ja/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): TabataとHIITを比較し、ワーク、レスト、ラウンド、合図をトレーニングに合わせます。
- [Tabata와 HIIT 차이: 알맞은 타이머 설정](https://easyfit.support/ko/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): Tabata와 HIIT를 비교해 운동, 휴식, 라운드, 신호를 세션에 맞춥니다.
- [Tabata 与 HIIT：如何设置合适的间歇计时器](https://easyfit.support/zh-hans/guides/tabata-vs-hiit/): 比较 Tabata 与 HIIT，让训练、休息、轮数和提示更适合你的训练。
- [EMOM vs AMRAP: Timer-Einstellungen fuer beide Formate](https://easyfit.support/de/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): Lerne, wie EMOM und AMRAP unterschiedliche Timer, Signale und Runden brauchen.
- [EMOM vs AMRAP: ajustes de temporizador para cada formato](https://easyfit.support/es/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): Aprende cómo EMOM y AMRAP usan temporizadores, señales y rondas diferentes.
- [EMOM vs AMRAP : réglages de minuteur pour chaque format](https://easyfit.support/fr/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): Découvrez comment EMOM et AMRAP utilisent des minuteurs, signaux et tours différents.
- [EMOM vs AMRAP: impostazioni timer per ogni formato](https://easyfit.support/it/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): Scopri come EMOM e AMRAP usano timer, segnali e round diversi.
- [EMOM vs AMRAP: ajustes de timer para cada formato](https://easyfit.support/pt-br/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): Entenda como EMOM e AMRAP usam timers, sinais e rounds diferentes.
- [EMOMとAMRAPの違い：形式別タイマー設定](https://easyfit.support/ja/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): EMOMとAMRAPで異なるタイマー、合図、ラウンドの使い方を整理します。
- [EMOM과 AMRAP 차이: 형식별 타이머 설정](https://easyfit.support/ko/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): EMOM과 AMRAP이 서로 다른 타이머, 신호, 라운드를 쓰는 방식을 정리합니다.
- [EMOM 与 AMRAP：不同训练格式的计时器设置](https://easyfit.support/zh-hans/guides/emom-vs-amrap/): 了解 EMOM 与 AMRAP 如何使用不同的计时、提示和轮数。
- [Zirkeltraining Timer einrichten](https://easyfit.support/de/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): Baue Timer fuer Stationen, Runden, Pausen, Uebungen und Apple Watch Signale.
- [Cómo configurar un temporizador de circuito](https://easyfit.support/es/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): Crea temporizadores con estaciones, rondas, descansos, ejercicios y señales.
- [Configurer un minuteur de circuit training](https://easyfit.support/fr/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): Créez un minuteur avec stations, tours, repos, exercices et signaux.
- [Come configurare un timer per circuit training](https://easyfit.support/it/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): Crea timer con stazioni, round, recuperi, esercizi e segnali.
- [Como configurar um timer de treino em circuito](https://easyfit.support/pt-br/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): Crie timers com estações, rounds, descansos, exercícios e sinais.
- [サーキットトレーニングタイマーの設定方法](https://easyfit.support/ja/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): ステーション、ラウンド、休憩、エクササイズ、合図を組み立てます。
- [서킷 트레이닝 타이머 설정 방법](https://easyfit.support/ko/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): 스테이션, 라운드, 휴식, 운동 목록, 신호를 구성합니다.
- [如何设置循环训练计时器](https://easyfit.support/zh-hans/guides/circuit-training-timer-setup/): 设置训练站点、轮数、休息、动作列表和提示。
- [Boxing Round Timer richtig einstellen](https://easyfit.support/de/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): Plane Runden, Pausen, Signale, Vorbereitung und Cooldown fuer Boxtraining.
- [Ajustes de temporizador para rounds de boxeo](https://easyfit.support/es/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): Configura rounds, descansos, señales, preparación y vuelta a la calma.
- [Réglages de minuteur pour rounds de boxe](https://easyfit.support/fr/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): Configurez rounds, repos, signaux, préparation et retour au calme.
- [Impostazioni timer per round di boxe](https://easyfit.support/it/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): Configura round, recuperi, segnali, preparazione e defaticamento.
- [Ajustes de timer para rounds de boxe](https://easyfit.support/pt-br/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): Configure rounds, descanso, sinais, preparação e desaquecimento.
- [ボクシングラウンドタイマーの設定](https://easyfit.support/ja/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): ラウンド、休憩、合図、準備、クールダウンを設定します。
- [복싱 라운드 타이머 설정](https://easyfit.support/ko/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): 라운드, 휴식, 신호, 준비, 쿨다운을 설정합니다.
- [拳击回合计时器设置](https://easyfit.support/zh-hans/guides/boxing-round-timer-settings/): 设置回合、休息、提示、准备和冷却时间。
- [Interval Training Guides](https://easyfit.support/guides/): Practical EasyFit training guides.
- [Trainingsratgeber](https://easyfit.support/de/guides/): Localized EasyFit training guides.

- [Guias de treino](https://easyfit.support/pt-br/guides/): Localized EasyFit training guides.
- [トレーニングガイド](https://easyfit.support/ja/guides/): Localized EasyFit training guides.
- [운동 가이드](https://easyfit.support/ko/guides/): Localized EasyFit training guides.
- [训练指南](https://easyfit.support/zh-hans/guides/): Localized EasyFit training guides.
